summary: Stripe subscription billing integration testing completed. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All critical flows verified - Subscribe button shows $9.99/mo, redirects to Stripe Checkout, owner view shows 'Your Strategy' badge without subscribe button, Creator Dashboard and My Subscriptions pages work correctly.

issues: Shows 'Could not load marketplace' error - this page uses /api/marketplace/items endpoint which returns 404. The strategy marketplace is at /strategy-marketplace which works correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: Stripe integration is working correctly with test mode (sk_test_emergent)
Checkout endpoint correctly returns Stripe URL and session_id
Cancel-subscription returns 404 when no active subscription exists (correct behavior)
Status polling endpoint returns 404 for invalid sessions (correct behavior)
Owner view correctly shows 'Your Strategy' badge without subscribe/unsubscribe buttons
WebSocket errors for alerts are non-critical (expected behavior for free tier)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe billing integration fully tested. Pro user can subscribe to strategies via Stripe Checkout ($9.99/mo). Strategy owner sees 'Your Strategy' badge without subscribe button. Cancel-subscription endpoint works. Note: /marketplace page (not /strategy-marketplace) has a 404 error for /api/marketplace/items - this is a separate page from the strategy marketplace.

tests_executed.test: POST /api/marketplace/strategies/{id}/checkout returns Stripe URL for valid subscriber
tests_executed.details: Returns checkout URL starting with https://checkout.stripe.com

tests_executed.test: Checkout rejects self-subscription (creator trying to subscribe to own strategy)
tests_executed.details: Returns 400 with 'Cannot subscribe to your own strategy'

tests_executed.test: Cancel-subscription returns 404 when no active subscription exists
Status polling returns 404 for invalid session

tests_executed.details: Returns strategy with performance, signals, reviews

tests_executed.test: Strategy detail page shows 'Subscribe — $9.99/mo' button for logged-in non-owner
tests_executed.details: Button visible with correct price text

tests_executed.test: Clicking Subscribe button redirects to Stripe Checkout
tests_executed.details: Redirects to https://checkout.stripe.com with US$9.99 payment

tests_executed.test: Strategy detail page shows 'Your Strategy' badge for owner
tests_executed.details: Green badge shown, no subscribe/unsubscribe buttons
Shows Total: 6, Published: 4, Subscribers: 0 with strategy list

mocked_apis.note: Stripe payments are in test mode (sk_test_emergent). Checkout sessions are real Stripe test sessions.
